# foundry_organization (Resource)

Manages a Foundry organization.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the organization.
- `planned_organization_members` (Set of String) Planned list of members in this organization
- `planned_organization_roles` (Set of Object) Planned list of roles assigned to this organization (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--planned_organization_roles))

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the organization.
- `host_name` (String) The primary host name of the Organization. This should be used when constructing URLs for users of this Organization

### Read-Only

- `marking_id` (String) Marking id of the organization
- `organization_members` (Set of String) Actual list of members in this organization, computed after successful addition/removal of members
- `organization_roles` (Set of Object) Actual list of roles in this organization, computed after successful addition/removal of roles (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--organization_roles))
- `rid` (String) Identifier of the organization.

<a id="nestedatt--planned_organization_roles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `planned_organization_roles`

Required:

- `principal_id` (String)
- `role_id` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--organization_roles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `organization_roles`

Read-Only:

- `principal_id` (String)
- `role_id` (String)
